title: ottleya plebeia
intro: Ottleya plebeia, also known as the desert broom, is a small shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its yellow flowers and slender branches. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ottleya plebeia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Ottleya plebeia can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried powder for various herbal applications.
